8 I say therefore to the unmarried and widows, It is good for them if they abide even as I.

7:7 seems to imply that Paul has the gift of self control. So both verses seems to be asking the saints to follow Paul in this example. So the sense of verse 8 and 9 is this: "I say to the unmarried and widows to discipline themselves as I do. But if they cannot contain themselves, let them marry. It is "better to marry than be consumed with passion."
